hero.title: Feyza Villa
hero.tagline: A Luxury Escape in the Heart of Rize

about.label: Feyza Villa
about.title: A Unique Experience in Nature
about.text: Welcome to Feyza Villa, where luxury and comfort meet in the unique nature of the Black Sea. With its private heated pool and magnificent view, we are at your service all year round to create unforgettable memories with your loved ones.

amenities.label: Amenities
amenities.title: What We Offer
amenities.pool_desc: Private heated pool available 365 days a year.
amenities.view_desc: Panoramic view of the unique green valleys of the Black Sea.
amenities.garden_desc: A fully private garden area immersed in nature.
amenities.bed_desc: Comfortable sleep with premium mattress and linens.
amenities.kitchen_desc: Modern kitchen equipped with everything you need.
amenities.parking_desc: Secure private parking area for your vehicle.

booking.label: Booking
booking.title: Select Your Dates
booking.subtitle: Create your booking request by selecting your check-in and check-out dates from the calendar.
booking.wa_intro: Hello, I have a booking request for Feyza Villa.

location.label: Location
location.title: Pazar / Rize
location.text: Located in one of the most beautiful valleys of the Black Sea, in the heart of nature, our villa is an ideal location for those seeking both peace and adventure.

item1.text: A unique place for those seeking a peaceful holiday in nature! Being located by the stream in a quiet environment was truly relaxing. We enjoyed the nature view along with the pool in the garden. Waking up to the soothing sound of the stream and spending the day alone with nature was wonderful. The villa was very clean and comfortable, everything was thought of. We had a pleasant time as a family. Thanks.

item2.text: We arrived today, this place is truly wonderful. I absolutely recommend it to everyone. The owners are very friendly. We will stay here for 3 days and this will be the only place we come to every year. You can choose this place without thinking, you won't regret it. Thank you Feyza Villa family.

item3.text: A wonderful environment, the staff were very helpful. It was spotless and very comfortable, everything was considered. All we had to do was have fun. I will definitely come back when I visit Rize. I recommend it, definitely a peaceful place you should stay.

item4.text: The location is perfect, the villa is perfect, everything you need is more than available inside. The villa owners are smiling and warm-hearted people. There is a reliable environment. It is also a few minutes away from the center. You can stay without second thoughts.

item5.text: An amazing place in Rize in one word. I went with my family, its large garden was a great social activity for the children. I congratulate them, they did a good job.

item6.text: The location is perfect. In nature, a stream in front, a true natural wonder. The pool is a different kind of beautiful. A very suitable place for a family. I absolutely recommend it, everything is perfect.
